---
title: "Final_Project_Code"
output: html_document
---
```{r setup}
      knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("/home1/emmashih/490_cluster/analysis_data")) 
```

```{r}
library(TCGAbiolinks)
library(maftools)
```

```{r}
clin_query <- GDCquery(project = "TCGA-SKCM",
data.category = "Clinical",
data.type = "Clinical Supplement",
data.format = 'SKCM Biotab')
# GDCdownload(clin_query)
clinical.BCRtab.all <- GDCprepare(clin_query)
clinicSKCM <- clinical.BCRtab.all$clinical_patient_skcm[-c(1,2),]
```

```{r Exercise 4.2}
clinicSKCM$stage_simple <- ifelse(grepl("^Stage IV", clinicSKCM$ajcc_pathologic_tumor_stage), 4,
                           ifelse(grepl("^Stage III", clinicSKCM$ajcc_pathologic_tumor_stage), 3,
                           ifelse(grepl("^Stage II", clinicSKCM$ajcc_pathologic_tumor_stage), 2,
                           ifelse(grepl("^Stage I($|[^VIX])", clinicSKCM$ajcc_pathologic_tumor_stage), 1, NA))))

clinicSKCM$age <- as.numeric(clinicSKCM$age_at_diagnosis)

clinicSKCM_scatter <- clinicSKCM[!is.na(clinicSKCM$stage_simple) & !is.na(clinicSKCM$age), ]

plot(jitter(clinicSKCM_scatter$stage_simple, amount = 0.1), clinicSKCM_scatter$age,
     xlab = "Tumor Stage",
     ylab = "Age at Diagnosis",
     main = "Scatterplot of Age vs Tumor Stage",
     pch = 19)

axis(1, at = c(1, 2, 3, 4), labels = c("Stage I", "Stage II", "Stage III", "Stage IV"))
```
